purpose: Premium owner-approved visual identity per covered country inside the unified CBW system; presentation only — never signals availability, eligibility or endorsement

artStyle.style: flat-vector geometric illustration; CBW navy base; one country accent duo; restrained line detail; landmark/motif silhouettes
artStyle.composition: wide masthead scene, content-safe zone, silhouettes edge-anchored, calm density under 56px header
artStyle.consistency: all countries share style, stroke weight, perspective grammar, navy base

countryVisualProfileContract.displayName: English display name (localized names from locale layer)
countryVisualProfileContract.accentPalette: exactly 2 accents (+ optional tint), harmonized with CBW navy/amber, contrast-checked
countryVisualProfileContract.flagPolicy: flag only as small identification glyph in controls/chips; never artwork base, background or grids
countryVisualProfileContract.emblemPolicy: official coats of arms NOT used by default; requires explicit owner approval + documented rights/usage review
countryVisualProfileContract.ogArtwork: 1200x630 social card; brand chrome outside artwork layer
countryVisualProfileContract.attributionRights: generation source, license/usage basis, rights review, reviewer, date
countryVisualProfileContract.approvalStatus: DRAFT → OWNER_REVIEW → APPROVED → RETIRED; only APPROVED ships

artworkRules: responsive (masters + defined crops; no layout-critical detail outside safe zones)
localization-safe (nothing to translate; cultural review; no religious/political symbols; no contested-border maps)
legible under light and dark chrome
never contains or recolors exchange brands

storage.publicRule: web-optimized exports enter public/** only via owner-gated PRODUCTION_ASSET_EXPORT task

countryMastheadSystem.desktopBand: ≤200px artwork + UI-typeset country name + evidence chip
countryMastheadSystem.accentUsage: accent palette drives kickers/chips only on that country's surfaces
countryMastheadSystem.placement: Country pages primary; compact optional on exchange-country and restricted pages; never on offer-first or methodology surfaces

generationApprovalWorkflow: ChatGPT art direction + generation per standard
owner review (style, recognizability, cultural check) with revision loop
ingestion into owner-assets + registry entry (checksums, rights record)
PRODUCTION_ASSET_EXPORT task (separately authorized) for public/** derivatives
generationGate: no pack generated before COUNTRY_ART_GENERATION_AUTHORIZED for that batch

pilotPlan.note: defined only — country visual generation is pending explicit COUNTRY_ART_GENERATION_AUTHORIZED approval

candidates: Warsaw skyline with Palace of Culture silhouette

ciBlocks: artwork in public/** without export-task trail

languageSiblingRule.rule: a CountryVisualProfile belongs to the country, not the language; the same pack serves every language sibling — KZ: /kz/ru/, /kz/kk/, /kz/en/ · PL: /pl/pl/, /pl/uk/, /pl/ru/, /pl/en/ · DE: /de/de/, /de/en/ — identical artwork, palette, safe zones
languageSiblingRule.ciGate: LOCALE14 + LOCALE25: country artwork identity identical across language siblings

lifecycle.note: implementation and production remain separately unauthorized
